items.summary: On the ZurichCouplesLandingPage (frontend/src/pages/ZurichCouplesLandingPage.tsx), replace the hero/entry image with an HTML5 video player that plays the uploaded MP4 video file. The video should be placed at frontend/public/assets/videos/hero-paarberatung-zuerich.mp4. The video element should autoplay, be muted, loop, and be fully responsive (object-fit: cover), matching the dimensions and layout of the existing hero image it replaces.
